  • Method Details

    • getReasonerID

      public String getReasonerID()
      Description copied from interface: IReasoner
      Returns the unique id of this reasoner, that is the value of the id field used when registering it to the extension point org.eventb.core.seqprover.reasoners.
      Returns:
      the unique id of this reasoner

    • getVersion

      public static int getVersion()

    • getReasonerDesc

      protected String getReasonerDesc()
      Specified by:
      getReasonerDesc in class PFunSetInputReasoner

    • verifyGoal

      protected IReasonerFailure verifyGoal(Predicate goal, IReasonerInput input)
      Description copied from class: PFunSetInputReasoner
      Check if the function f enclosed in the sequent goal is of the correct type. Returns an IReasonerFailure if check failed, or null if type check succeeded.
      Specified by:
      verifyGoal in class PFunSetInputReasoner
      Parameters:
      goal - The predicate enclosing the function f
      input - The input given by the user
      Returns:
      an IReasonerFailure if f is not of the right form, null otherwise

    • verifyInput

      protected IReasonerFailure verifyInput(Predicate goal, PFunSetInput input)
      Description copied from class: PFunSetInputReasoner
      Check if the input has the correct type. Returns an IReasonerFailure if type check occured, or null if type check succeeded.
      Specified by:
      verifyInput in class PFunSetInputReasoner
      Parameters:
      goal - the predicate enclosing the function f
      input - the set of partial functions given by the user, to type check the function
      Returns:
      an IReasonerFailure if type check failed, null otherwise

    • getSubgoals

      protected Predicate[] getSubgoals(Predicate goal, PFunSetInput input)
      Description copied from class: PFunSetInputReasoner
      Computes an array of subgoals that constitute the antecedents of the rule implemented by this reasoner.
      Specified by:
      getSubgoals in class PFunSetInputReasoner
      Parameters:
      goal - the predicate enclosing the function f
      input - the input given by the user
      Returns:
      an array of subgoals to build the ProofRule
